title: Fix plugin export surface

tasks.title: Add runtime export-surface contract test
tasks.verification: RED evidence: `bun test test/package-contract.test.ts` fails on export-surface assertion. Received exports ["createPluginContext","default","handleChatMessage","handleEvent"] instead of expected ["default"]. This is the intended failing contract for AC1/AC2/AC3/AC5 before runtime split.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added package runtime contract test that installs/builds plugin, imports dist/index.js, and asserts the runtime module exports only default V1 plugin object with id/server. RED evidence confirms current exports include createPluginContext, handleChatMessage, and handleEvent.
tasks.notes: Added RED export-surface contract test. It fails against current dist because helper exports are visible beside default, proving the bug shape.

error_recovery.last_error: Initial test run failed because tsup was unavailable before installing plugin dependencies.

attempts.error: `bun run build` failed with `tsup: command not found`.
attempts.diagnosis: Worktree plugin dependencies were not installed, so the test could not reach the intended export-shape assertion.
attempts.fix_tried: Added `bun install --frozen-lockfile` step inside the export-surface test before invoking `bun run build`.

tasks.title: Split plugin runtime entry from internals and adopt V1 module
tasks.verification: GREEN: runtime entry split completed. `bun test test/package-contract.test.ts` passes, proving built dist exports only default V1 object {id, server}. `bun run typecheck` passes after test import migration. Runtime entry plugin.ts contains only default export; helpers moved to plugin-internal.ts.
tasks.implementation_summary: Moved testable helper implementation into plugin/src/plugin-internal.ts. Replaced plugin/src/plugin.ts with a thin V1 PluginModule default export containing exactly id and server. Server accepts OpenCode V1 input/options shape and delegates to internal hook creation. Package contract test now passes and proves built dist exports only default with id/server.
tasks.notes: Split runtime entry from internals and adopted V1 module shape.

error_recovery.last_error: Initial typecheck failed because V1 Plugin type did not match loose internal PluginHooks and tests still imported helpers from plugin.ts.

attempts.error: TypeScript errors: Plugin return type mismatch, unsafe PluginInput cast warning, stale plugin.test helper imports, and dist import typing.
attempts.diagnosis: Runtime entry needed an explicit Plugin cast at boundary and tests needed migration to internal module / unknown runtime hook calls.
attempts.fix_tried: Wrapped server with Plugin boundary cast, moved tests to plugin-internal.ts, added runtime hook call helpers, and used URL dynamic import for dist contract test.

tasks.title: Update plugin behavior tests for internal/runtime split
tasks.verification: Behavior test migration verified. `bun test test/plugin.test.ts` passes (19 pass); `bun run typecheck` passes. No additional source changes after prior split checkpoint.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated plugin behavior tests to import helper functions from plugin-internal.ts and exercise the runtime V1 module through pluginModule.server. Added test helper wrappers for intentionally malformed unknown hook payloads so typecheck remains strict while preserving malformed-payload coverage.
tasks.notes: Behavior tests migrated and verified after runtime/internal split.

tasks.title: Run build, deploy, and live OpenCode proof
tasks.verification: Harden remediation: added structural PluginInput guard at V1 server boundary, removed no-op Promise.resolve microtick, and deduplicated createPluginHooks JSDoc. Verification passed: bun run typecheck, bun test test/plugin.test.ts test/package-contract.test.ts, make build-plugin, make test (92 plugin tests + Go tests), make lint, ./scripts/deploy-local.sh --dry-run.
tasks.notes: Build, deploy, and live OpenCode proof passed. OMR plugin remains enabled.

wisdom.content: For OpenCode plugins, runtime package entry should default-export a V1 PluginModule object `{ id, server }` and avoid named function exports. Legacy loader enumerates function-valued exports as plugins, so test seams must live in internal modules and export-surface tests should assert `Object.keys(dist) === ['default']`.

proposal.approval_evidence: User approved proposal with explicit reply: approve. Problem confirmed: rebuilt OMR package still fails live OpenCode startup because runtime entry exposes helper function exports and triggers legacy export enumeration. Proceeding to discovery/agreement.

discovery.approval_evidence: User approved agreement with explicit reply: approve. Contract minted with AC1-AC9, C1-C7, DONT1-DONT5. Discovery evidence: live opencode models failed when OMR plugin was enabled and recovered when disabled; deployed module exported helper functions; researcher confirmed OpenCode V1 object-shaped default bypasses legacy, while legacy treats function exports as plugins.

design.approval_evidence: Design persisted. Independent validator verdict CONCERNS; all validator blockers integrated into design: mandatory source-level runtime/internal split, plugin.ts only export default, V1 object exactly {id, server}, server(input, options) two-arg signature, no tui/extras, export-surface assertions, plugin.test import migration. No user-value tradeoff or contract-compromise risk remains.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved prep task graph with explicit reply: approve. Four tasks cover export-surface contract test, runtime/internal split, behavior test migration, and full build/deploy/live OpenCode proof.

execution.approval_evidence: All 4 tasks completed. Verification passed: make build-plugin, make test (Go tests + 92 plugin tests), make lint, deploy-local --dry-run, make deploy-local, export inspection showing only default {id,server}, deploy-local --check, and live opencode models with OMR enabled. Strict validation passed with only NO_DELTAS warning.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted acceptance report with explicit reply: accept. Acceptance verdict APPROVED; contract matrix 21/21 passed/respected; verification includes make build-plugin, make test, make lint, deploy-local dry-run, make deploy-local, deploy-local --check, built export inspection, and live opencode models with OMR enabled/no O.config or r.provider failures. Executive summary persisted.

items.text: Built runtime import of `plugin/dist/index.js` exposes exactly one module export: `default`.
`default` is an object-shaped OpenCode V1 plugin module with stable `id` and function-valued `server`.
No helper functions (`createPluginContext`, `handleChatMessage`, `handleEvent`, normalizers, or test seams) are exported from `plugin/dist/index.js`.
Existing plugin behavior remains covered through an internal/testable source module.
Runtime export-surface test fails on the current multi-function export shape and passes after the fix.
Existing plugin behavior tests pass after imports are updated to the internal module.
`make build-plugin`, `make test`, `make lint`, and `./scripts/deploy-local.sh --dry-run` pass.
Live proof passes with OMR enabled in `~/.config/opencode/opencode.jsonc`: fresh `opencode models` exits 0 and does not log `O.config` or `r.provider` startup failures.
OMR remains enabled after live proof; if proof fails, OMR is re-disabled and failure evidence is preserved.
Do not remove OMP compatibility in this change.
Do not change user-facing fallback config schema (`agent.<name>.options.fallback_models`).
Do not rewrite fallback routing behavior, cooldown behavior, TTFT policy, or replay orchestration except for mechanical imports required by the export-surface fix.
Do not patch OpenCode core.
Keep the plugin `id` stable once chosen: `@sharper-flow/opencode-model-routing-plugin`.
Prefer structural source/package/export tests over heuristic log matching for correctness; log checks are live-proof evidence only.
Keep local deploy package-shaped and bundled; do not revert to raw TypeScript loading.
Do not leave function-valued helper exports on the runtime package entry.
Do not make `default` a plugin function; that still triggers legacy fallback. It must be an object-shaped V1 module.
Do not rely on tsup-specific export hiding without a source-level runtime/internal split unless proven structurally by tests.
Do not leave OpenCode config broken if live proof fails.
Do not proceed to OMP removal before this change passes live proof.

rows.evidence: Export-surface contract test imports built plugin/dist/index.js and asserts Object.keys(module) === ["default"]. `bun test test/package-contract.test.ts` and `make test` passed.
rows.notes: Built runtime exposes exactly one module export.

rows.evidence: Export-surface test asserts default object keys are exactly ["id","server"], id is @sharper-flow/opencode-model-routing-plugin, and server is a function. Passed in package contract test.
rows.notes: Default is object-shaped V1 plugin module.

rows.evidence: Export-surface test asserts module keys exactly ["default"]. Built export inspection returned {keys:["default"], defaultKeys:["id","server"]}.
rows.notes: No helper exports remain in runtime entry.

rows.evidence: plugin.test imports createPluginContext/handleChatMessage/handleEvent from plugin-internal.ts and runtime tests through pluginModule.server. `bun test test/plugin.test.ts` passed 19 tests.
rows.notes: Behavior remains covered through internal/testable source module.

rows.evidence: RED: package contract test failed on current multi-function export shape. GREEN: same test passed after runtime/internal split.
rows.notes: TDD evidence recorded in tk-cdac3728b507 and tk-68e271faad87.

rows.evidence: Existing plugin behavior tests passed: `bun test test/plugin.test.ts` 19 pass; full `make test` passed with 92 plugin tests.
`make build-plugin`, `make test`, `make lint`, and `./scripts/deploy-local.sh --dry-run` all passed.

With OMR enabled in ~/.config/opencode/opencode.jsonc, fresh `opencode models` exited 0. Log /home/jon/.local/share/opencode/log/2026-05-23T045626.log loads file:///home/jon/.local/share/opencode-model-routing/plugin and contains no ERROR lines or O.config/r.provider failures.
OMR plugin path remains enabled in opencode.jsonc after live proof; deploy-local --check reports plugin registered.
cmd/omp and build-omp were not touched; OMP compatibility unchanged.
No changes to schema/fallback-schema.json or fallback_models config path; schema-contract-check passed in make lint.
Changes limited to runtime export surface, internal module split, and tests; no routing/cooldown/TTFT/replay logic rewrite beyond imports.
No OpenCode core repository files patched; only this plugin repo and global config enablement for live proof.
Runtime id is @sharper-flow/opencode-model-routing-plugin in plugin.ts and asserted by export-surface test.
Export-surface package test structurally checks module/object keys; logs used only for live proof absence of prior startup failures.
make deploy-local and deploy-local --dry-run verify bundled package-shaped runtime dist/index.js; package.json still points at dist/index.js.
Built runtime exports only default; helper functions moved to plugin-internal.ts and are not exported from dist/index.js.
Default export is object-shaped {id, server}; export-surface test asserts typeof default is object and server is function.
rows.notes: Default is not a plugin function.

rows.evidence: Source-level split implemented; no tsup export hiding relied on. plugin.ts imports internals and only export default V1 object.
Live proof passed; OMR remains enabled. No broken config left behind.
No OMP removal tasks or file changes were performed; OMP removal remains a follow-up after proof.
rows.notes: Removal now unblocked but not done here.

acceptanceCriteria: Built runtime import of `plugin/dist/index.js` exposes exactly one module export: `default`.
`default` is an object-shaped OpenCode V1 plugin module with stable `id` and function-valued `server`.
No helper functions (`createPluginContext`, `handleChatMessage`, `handleEvent`, normalizers, or test seams) are exported from `plugin/dist/index.js`.
Existing plugin behavior remains covered through an internal/testable source module.
Runtime export-surface test fails on the current multi-function export shape and passes after the fix.
Existing plugin behavior tests pass after imports are updated to the internal module.
Live proof passes with OMR enabled in `~/.config/opencode/opencode.jsonc`: fresh `opencode models` exits 0 and does not log `O.config` or `r.provider` startup failures.
OMR remains enabled after live proof; if proof fails, OMR is re-disabled and failure evidence is preserved.
